page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive workloads. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor with 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features a dedicated CPU allocation with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, providing consistent processing performance without hyper-threading overhead.

The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the server is equipped with two NVIDIA L20 GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. This GPU and memory combination supports parallel processing tasks, though the instance does not include local NVMe storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating data transfer between the instance and external storage or other network resources. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU cores and dual-GPU architecture position this instance as a specialized resource for workloads requiring high parallel computing density rather than general-purpose utility.

Appropriate workloads for the ecs.gn8is-2x.8xlarge include machine learning inference, data science pipelines, graphics rendering, and other GPU-accelerated compute tasks that benefit from dedicated Intel Xeon processing and dual NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance configured with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C vCPUs operating at 3.3 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. The hardware profile features 256.0 GB of system memory and two NVIDIA L20 GPUs from the Ada Lovelace family, providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions supported by a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core to ensure stable performance. The combination of dedicated Intel processors and dual NVIDIA GPUs makes this instance applicable for parallel computing workloads, including machine learning inference, data science, and complex rendering tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA L20 GPUs with 96 GB VRAM for parallel computing workloads.

tagline: A dual-GPU accelerated server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and ninety-six gigabytes of VRAM for parallel computing workloads.

Two NVIDIA L20 Ada Lovelace GPUs providing 96 GB of total VRAM
256 GB of system memory offering 8.0 GB of RAM per core
